name: Performapal Miss Director
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ミス・ディレクター
desc: While you control an "Odd-Eyes" monster, your opponent's monsters cannot target this card for attacks. While this card is in face-up Defense Position, your "Odd-Eyes" monsters cannot be destroyed by battle, also you take no battle damage from that battle. You can target 1 Level 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but negate its effects, then, immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 monster using only this card and the Summoned monster. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Miss Director" once per turn.
mnst_eff: While you control an "Odd-Eyes" monster, your opponent's monsters cannot target this card for attacks. While this card is in face-up Defense Position, your "Odd-Eyes" monsters cannot be destroyed by battle, also you take no battle damage from that battle. You can target 1 Level 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but negate its effects, then, immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 monster using only this card and the Summoned monster. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Miss Director" once per turn.
eff: While you control an "Odd-Eyes" monster, your opponent's monsters cannot target this card for attacks. While this card is in face-up Defense Position, your "Odd-Eyes" monsters cannot be destroyed by battle, also you take no battle damage from that battle. You can target 1 Level 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but negate its effects, then, immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 monster using only this card and the Summoned monster. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Miss Director" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Uses itself as a Synchro Material
Can only use certain Synchro Materials
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
